title: Bringing over JIRA Sprint field to Monday board

posts.author: acampisano (Ashley Campisano)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

It does not seem that the JIRA sprint field is supported by Monday.com when using a recipe to bring over the data in JIRA over to a Monday board.

Has anyone found a work around for this? We would like to use Monday as an alternative to JIRA but it is difficult to do so without bringing over a key JIRA field.

Thanks!

posts.author: jamie.fickes (Jamie Fickes)
posts.cookedHtml: I am trying to solve for this same issue. We are already in Monday.com though.
